content.text:
Fix the failing unit test in src/utils.ts
<environment_context><cwd>/home/user/my-project</cwd></environment_context>
I'll look at the failing test and fix the issue. Let me start by running the tests to see the error.

item.output:
FAIL src/utils.test.ts
  ✕ formatDate should handle timezone
    Expected: "2025-03-05"
    Received: "2025-03-04"

content.text: The test is failing because `formatDate` doesn't account for timezone offsets. Let me fix the implementation.

item.output:
PASS src/utils.test.ts
  ✓ formatDate should handle timezone

content.text: Fixed! The issue was that `toISOString()` converts to UTC first, which can shift the date backward. Using local date methods gives the correct result.
